benefits.description: Completely changed skin texture, described as slippery and soft
Skin clarity and reduced wrinkling, better than most 30-year-olds at age 57
Injected into creaky knee and was fixed in a week

protocol_notes: 2 months on, 1 month off cycle for the last year. Uses red meat based diet with fresh salmon eggs weekly. Takes 0.5gm/day of desiccated thymus and kidney. Microneedling 1.5mm every 6-8 weeks. Age 57, raised in San Diego, CA. Skin better than most 30-year-olds but starting to show some laxity. Was vegetarian 5-35, then shifted diet over 20 years through omnivore, paleo, keto paleo, meat-based, to carnivore. Currently meat-based 6 months/year and carnivore in winter. Added desiccated organs 3 years ago. Microneedling routine for roughly 4 years. Uses lido cream for numbing during microneedling. Treats face, neck, chest, and forearms. GHK-Cu and Laennec on separate schedules.
